title: Soban Singh Jeena University B.A., B.Sc, B.Com Time Table 2026 Released – Download PDF

detail.title: Soban Singh Jeena University B.A., B.Sc, B.Com Time Table 2026 Released – Download PDF
detail.short_info: The officials of SSJU have released the SSJU Time Table 2026 for B.A., B.Sc, B.Com Programmes. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

sections.heading: Soban Singh Jeena University B.A., B.Sc, B.Com Time Table 2026 Released – Download PDF

content.text: Soban Singh Jeena University (SSJU) has announced the B.A., B.Sc, B.Com (1st, 2nd, and 3rd Year) Exam Timetable 2026 on 07-03-2026 for the 2026 academic session. The timetable is now available for download on the official SSJU website at ssju.ac.in. Students can check and download the official schedule to plan their exam preparation effectively.

Students can access the timetable by visiting the SSJU portal at ssju.ac.in or using the direct link provided below. It is recommended to download and save the timetable PDF for easy access and future reference.

sections.heading: Soban Singh Jeena University Time Table 2026 Overview

content.text: Soban Singh Jeena University has published the B.A., B.Sc, B.Com (1st, 2nd, and 3rd Year) Time Table on its official site for the 2026 Academic Session. The table below highlights key details such as release date, academic session, and official link to the timetable PDF.

sections.heading: Soban Singh Jeena University Time Table 2026 - Exam Dates

content.text: Soban Singh Jeena University has released the official B.A., B.Sc, B.Com (1st, 2nd, and 3rd Year) Time Table 2026. The following table lists the subject-wise exam dates and schedule as per the official notification.
The detailed subject-wise schedule is available in the official PDF. Download the timetable PDF here to view complete exam dates, paper codes, and timings.

sections.heading: Soban Singh Jeena University Time Table 2026 Direct Download Link

content.text: Soban Singh Jeena University has activated the official PDF download link for the B.A., B.Sc, B.Com (1st, 2nd, and 3rd Year) Time Table 2026. Students enrolled under the 2026 can directly access and download their complete schedule using the link provided below.

rows: B.A., B.Sc, B.Com (1st, 2nd, and 3rd Year) Time Table 2026

sections.heading: How to Download Soban Singh Jeena University Time Table 2026 Online?

content.text: SSJU has simplified the Exam Timetable access process for B.A., B.Sc, B.Com students. Most timetables can be downloaded without login. Follow these steps to get your Exam Timetable PDF:

items: Visit the official SSJU website - ssju.ac.in
Go to the Examination or Academic Schedule section
Select your B.A., B.Sc, B.Com (1st, 2nd, and 3rd Year) from the listed schedules
Locate the correct Exam Timetable for 2026
Click to open the timetable in PDF format
Download or save the file on your device
Review the schedule carefully - verify exam dates, subject names, and time slots
